name: Sweet Bite Idle Game
description: Welcome to Sweet Bite Idle Game, a fun and relaxing tycoon adventure! Build your own confectionery empire and turn a small pastry shop into a sweet kingdom. Grow ingredients like sugar cane and fruits on your farm, then create delicious desserts to satisfy your customers. Experiment with recipes, upgrade your production, and expand your business step by step. Hire workers, improve efficiency, and enjoy smooth idle gameplay as your sweet empire grows.
instructions: Tap or swipe to control actions Grow and collect ingredients Make desserts and serve customers Hire and upgrade workers Expand your shop and increase profits
